textByHash.16b7b340360f6b8b6d6063933f43a5eff08b1510: Sorry, I haven't got time to chat. We've only just finished a collossal order of furniture for the Varrock area, and already there's more work coming in.
textByHash.13e9e2b720e44235df2485d311479a73974eeb43: Yeah, the Council's had it redecorated.
textByHash.b7e53391c7606e57dee787658aa5f06aa49c05d4: You'd better let me get on with my work.
